you_are_here: Phases 4, 5, 7 active — Rubric · Sourcing Layer · Data Capture. Matching engine (Phase 6) deliberately held pending form data.

summary.build_time: Sourcing Assistant v2 live. Matching engine on hold pending mandate form data.

naming_note.17_Ishwa_Apps_Script.js: Bound to Google Sheet — deployed, same URL
naming_note.18_Ishwa_Mandate_Reference.xlsx: Shared with Somanshu — internally tracked as 17 on Drive/Sheets

phases.name: Scoping & Diagnosis
phases.title: Engagement scoping & problem diagnosis
phases.desc: Structured strategy session with Shalini Gupta. Problem diagnosed: Ishwa's quality edge lives entirely in consultant judgement — no documented framework, no structured AI input. Solution architecture defined across three layers.

phases.name: Data Audit
phases.title: Data receipt, audit & documentation
phases.desc: Five data files received from Ishwa (Zoho Recruit + CRM, covering Sep 2022 — Mar 2026). Full audit completed. Three structural gaps identified. Audit documents, data capture templates, interactive forms, and the ChatGPT Search Assistant built and delivered.

milestone.label: All audit documents, templates and meeting prep delivered

phases.name: Client Inputs
phases.title: 8 April session — decisions locked, build unblocked
phases.desc: Three-step workflow agreed. Data capture path confirmed (Option C — web forms). Order book received from Somanshu and analysed. Meeting minutes, order book analysis, and rubric scaffold sent to Ishwa on 22 April. Both forms live with Ishwa as of 24 April.

deliverables.label: 15 — Combined mandate data entry form — supersedes 04 and 05
Apps Script (Google Sheets integration) — v3 active

milestone.label: Forms live with Ishwa. Data flowing to Google Sheets.

phases.name: Rubric Build
phases.title: Rubric calibration — externalise consultant judgement
phases.desc: Rubric scaffold (13A) sent to Ishwa for review. Walkthrough session to follow once Ishwa responds. Rubric feeds the matching engine in Phase 6 and the profile scoring logic in Phase 5.
phases.blocker: Awaiting Ishwa response to 13A before walkthrough session can be scheduled.

milestone.label: Evaluation rubric v1 signed off by Ishwa

phases.name: Sourcing Layer
phases.title: Sourcing compression — primary problem being addressed
phases.desc: AI Sourcing Assistant v2 live as of 14 May 2026. Major upgrade from v1: multi-title role input, multi-select seniority, Company Stage optional, Key Skills field, expanded sectors, Education field, up to 50 companies per output (mid-tier weighted), Resdex strings appear first, primary + secondary string, company count badge per segment, Copy All and Download XLSX export. Screen recordings received and analysed (Aparna — search construction + Resdex filter setup). Decision made: 200→10 profile review recording is a soft ask only — matching engine will be calibrated primarily from mandate form data (Varsha verdict format). Sourcing tool does not touch Naukri — it replaces the pre-Naukri ChatGPT step only.

deliverables.label: 14 — Sourcing workflow analysis — ready to send to Shalini
16 — AI Sourcing Assistant v2 — live on GitHub Pages
Vercel proxy deployed — API routed through PiP_AGI
Feedback from consultants incorporated in v2
LinkedIn Recruiter status confirmed with Shalini
200 → 10 scoring design — soft ask, not a blocker

milestone.label: Sourcing assistant v2 live. 200→10 design deferred — forms are primary training source.

phases.name: Matching Engine
phases.title: Matching engine prototype — deliberately held pending form data
phases.desc: AI evaluation layer. Takes structured mandate JSON + candidate profiles, returns ranked shortlist with per-criterion scores and plain-language rationale. Architecture designed. Build deliberately held — will be calibrated against mandate form data (Section 5 notes: named candidates, accept/reject reasoning, CVs). 3 mandates and 11 candidates available as seed data from Varsha (May 2026). Build resumes once meaningful form dataset exists (target: 50+ entries with notes).

deliverables.label: Seed data received — 3 mandates, 11 candidates, verdicts from Varsha

phases.blocker: Deliberately held. Will build once mandate forms have 50+ entries with Section 5 notes populated. Re-work risk too high with current dataset.

phases.name: Data Capture
phases.title: Data capture — queue form live, retrospective entry underway
phases.desc: Queue form (17) live. Mandate Reference Sheet (18) with Somanshu. Retrospective entry underway. Critical ask to Somanshu (14 May): consultants must populate Section 5 (Commercials and Learnings) with named candidates, accept/reject reasoning, and CV attachments — Varsha's sample case format is the gold standard. This section is the primary training input for the matching engine.

deliverables.label: 17 — Queue form — live on GitHub Pages
17 — Apps Script v3 — bound to Google Sheet, deployed
18 — Mandate Reference Sheet — 409 mandates, 60 columns, sent to Somanshu
Intake_Log + Closure_Log tabs — auto-created on first submission
Section 5 notes populated with candidate reasoning + CVs
50-mandate milestone with notes — target before matching engine build

milestone.label: Queue form live. Section 5 notes are the critical path to matching engine.

phases.name: BD Analytics
phases.title: BD pattern analysis — strategic intelligence layer
phases.desc: Pattern analysis across 3+ years of mandate data. Close rates by sector, average search duration by mandate type, ghost client signals, BD pipeline conversion. Delivered as a strategic insight report for leadership.

milestone.label: BD analytics report delivered to Ishwa leadership

open_actions.action: Monitor mandate form entries — target 50+ with Section 5 notes before matching engine build
open_actions.note: Section 5 notes with named candidates and reasoning is the critical path — Varsha format is the gold standard

open_actions.action: Send 14 — Sourcing workflow analysis to Shalini
open_actions.note: Confirm LinkedIn Recruiter access status first

open_actions.action: Chase Ishwa response to Rubric scaffold 13A
open_actions.note: Walkthrough session cannot be scheduled until received

open_actions.action: Soft ask — Resdex profile review recording with audio
open_actions.note: No pressure on timeline — not a blocker for matching engine build

open_actions.action: Verify closure write end-to-end with Somanshu team
open_actions.note: Console logs COMBINED SEND / COMBINED RESP confirm payload reaching script

key_decisions.rationale: Re-work risk too high with 11 candidate samples. Will build once 50+ mandate form entries with Section 5 notes exist. Forms are primary training data — not recordings.

key_decisions.decision: 200→10 profile review recording — soft ask only
key_decisions.rationale: Sufficient workflow visibility from existing recordings. Decision mechanism visible. More recordings would show different mandates, same cognitive pattern. Not a blocker.
All consultant feedback from May 8 incorporated. Tool replaces pre-Naukri ChatGPT step only — does not touch Naukri workflow.

key_decisions.decision: Varsha verdict format is the gold standard for Section 5
key_decisions.rationale: Named candidates, brief reasoning per candidate, CVs attached — this is exactly the signal the matching engine needs. Communicated to Somanshu in 14 May email.
